message:
✨ Add edit links to all main site pages

Add GitHub edit pencil icons to all kubestellar.io pages so users
can easily find and edit the source file for any page.

Pages updated:
- Home page
- Ladder page
- Partners page
- Products page
- Programs page
- Quick Installation page
- Contribute Handbook page
- Coming Soon pages

Each page now passes the correct filePath and docsPath props to
PageActions, enabling the edit button to link directly to the
source file on GitHub.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ export default function Home() {
   return (
     <main className="min-h-screen">
       <Navbar />
-      <PageActions position="fixed" />
+      <PageActions position="fixed" filePath="[locale]/page.tsx" docsPath="src/app/" />
       <HeroSection />
       <AboutSection />
       <HowItWorksSection />
